essential.text: assert forall i: int {:trigger newResult[i]} | 0 <= i < |newResult| :: forall m: int {:trigger stops[m]} | 0 <= m < k + 1 :: InSeq(newResult[i], stops[m]);
assert forall i: int {:trigger newResult[i]} | 0 <= i < |newResult| :: forall m: int {:trigger stops[m]} | 0 <= m < k + 1 :: InSeq(newResult[i], stops[m]);
assert forall x: int {:trigger InSeq(x, newResult)} :: (forall m: int {:trigger stops[m]} | 0 <= m < k + 1 :: InSeq(x, stops[m])) ==> InSeq(x, newResult);
assert forall x: int {:trigger InSeq(x, newResult)} :: (forall m: int {:trigger stops[m]} | 0 <= m < k + 1 :: InSeq(x, stops[m])) ==> InSeq(x, newResult);
